brand.name: natura essence
brand.tagline: eco-conscious skincare created to nourish, cleanse, and rejuvenate

hero.title: Nurturing Beauty with Nature's Touch
hero.subtitle: Certified organic skincare created to nourish your skin with pure botanicals, clean textures, and a calm daily ritual.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.headline: Explore our range of eco-friendly, skin-loving products designed to nourish, cleanse, and rejuvenate. Find the perfect match for your skincare routine.

features.title: Eco-Conscious Ingredients
features.description: We source naturally derived ingredients that are effective, gentle, and responsibly harvested.

features.title: Cruelty-Free & Vegan
features.description: Every formula is created without animal testing and with thoughtful plant-based alternatives.

features.title: Safe For All Skin Types
features.description: Balanced textures designed for dry, oily, combination, and sensitive skin.

features.title: Sustainable Packaging
features.description: Refill-first packaging and recyclable materials reduce waste without reducing quality.

collection.title: Our Collection
collection.description: Click any product to view full ingredients, usage, benefits, skin type, price, and cart actions.

products.name: NaturaFresh Cleanser
products.description: A gentle daily cleanser with creamy botanical foam and a soft skin finish.
products.longDescription: NaturaFresh Cleanser removes daily impurities without stripping the skin barrier. It is designed for morning and evening routines where freshness, softness, and balance matter.
products.directions: Apply to damp skin, massage for 30 seconds, then rinse with lukewarm water.

products.name: NaturaHydrate Cream
products.description: A rich hydration cream designed for long-lasting moisture and barrier support.
products.longDescription: NaturaHydrate Cream comforts dry skin with a cushiony texture and botanical oils. It helps reduce tightness and supports a healthier skin barrier.
products.directions: Apply a small amount after serum. Use morning and night.

products.name: NaturaGlow Bundle
products.description: A complete glow ritual with cleanser, serum, cream, and balancing mist.
products.longDescription: NaturaGlow Bundle brings together a complete botanical skincare routine for cleansing, hydration, nourishment, and glow maintenance.
products.directions: Use cleanser first, apply serum, seal with cream, and finish with mist.

products.name: NaturaEyes Cream
products.description: A lightweight eye cream for a smoother, refreshed under-eye look.
products.longDescription: NaturaEyes Cream is a soft under-eye treatment designed for daily hydration and a refreshed appearance without heaviness.
products.directions: Tap a rice-sized amount around the under-eye area using your ring finger.

natureSection.title: Nourished by Nature
natureSection.description: Our products are made with carefully selected natural ingredients, offering effective care that is kind to your skin and the planet.
